description:
You are a projectionist at an independent film festival preparing a late submission for exhibition. The raw submission files are in /home/ga/Videos/festival_submission/ (raw_film.mp4, english_subs.srt, directors_commentary.mp3, and remediation_notes.txt). Produce three master files in /home/ga/Videos/festival_masters/ based on the remediation instructions:

1. 'exhibition_master.mkv': MKV container with deinterlaced video, sync-corrected audio, and sync-corrected soft-subtitles (embedded as a selectable track).
2. 'hardsub_master.mp4': MP4 container with deinterlaced video, sync-corrected audio, and corrected subtitles burned directly into the
